narrative:
Springfield Twp C (precinct in Summit County) has 1,033 registered voters, with 62.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.8%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.5 percentage points.
